appraisal_events.evidence: « ...avec une mauvaise éducation... » / Récit de la consultation du grand-duc où Cottard diagnostique un « état toxique » et l'autre médecin retire un simple grain de poussière.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator lowers Cottard by emphasizing his social coarseness and a professional anecdote that ridicules him, while showing him jealous of more effective colleagues.

status_effects.explanation: He is presented unfavorably in terms of manners and competence, which diminishes his local estimation.
